title: orchis morio var. longicornu
intro: Orchis morio var. longicornu is a rare and endangered type of orchid, a flowering plant known for its vibrant greenish-yellow flowers and unique horned tip on the labellum. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Orchis morio var. longicornu have been reported to have health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and in some cases, it is also used to make tinctures and ointments for topical application.
